hypothesis: L-787 keyword-based 58:1 confirmation ratio is a measurement artifact. Lane-outcome method gives true ratio. Post-S396 intervention (P-243, science_quality.py, mode=falsification) reduced confirmation bias.
expect: Lane-outcome method shows lower ratio than 58:1 keyword. Post-S396 shows improvement. But n<20 post means not statistically significant.
methodology: Parse all MERGED lanes from SWARM-LANES.md (HEAD). Classify outcomes as CONFIRMED/FALSIFIED/NEGATIVE/RESOLVED/OTHER using actual/diff/notes fields. Split by era (pre/post S396). Compare confirmation rates.

loose_lane_outcome.note: broader keyword match in full lane text

results.significance: INSUFFICIENT (n=13 post, need n>=25 for significance)
results.unclassifiable_rate: 54% (outcome embedded in free-text, not structured field)

prescription: Add outcome_class to close_lane.py. Retest at S410.
